# Quick Fix: Shopify duplicate token fn, TSoft token cache, sync count
Generated: 2026-04-03T23:27:03Z

## Changes Made

### CRIT-1: Delete duplicate getAccessTokenForAdapter in shopify.adapter.ts
- File: `src/lib/marketplace/adapters/shopify.adapter.ts`
- Replaced 5 call sites of `getAccessTokenForAdapter(shopifyCreds)` with `getAccessToken(toShopifyCreds(credentials))` / `getAccessToken(shopifyCreds)` (imported fn with caching)
- Deleted the 28-line `getAccessTokenForAdapter` function definition at the bottom of the file
- The special case in `pushProduct` (collection add) needed `credentials` to re-derive creds, so used `getAccessToken(toShopifyCreds(credentials))` there; all other sites already had `shopifyCreds` in scope

### WARN-4: Add token caching to TSoft adapter
- File: `src/lib/marketplace/adapters/tsoft.adapter.ts`
- Added module-level `tokenCache: Map<string, CachedToken>` with 30-minute TTL
- Added `TOKEN_CACHE_TTL_MS`, `CachedToken` interface, and `getCacheKey` helper
- `getToken` now checks cache before calling login endpoint; stores result on cache miss

### WARN-8: Fix sync count excluding admin tenants
- File: `src/lib/sync-engine.ts`
- Extracted `nonAdminTenants = activeTenants.filter((t) => !t.isAdmin)` before the result object
- Changed `totalTenants: activeTenants.length` to `totalTenants: nonAdminTenants.length`
- Changed `syncPromises` to map over `nonAdminTenants` (removed the redundant `.filter((t) => !t.isAdmin)` inline)

## Verification
- Build: PASS (Compiled successfully, 42/42 static pages generated)
- No type errors introduced
- DYNAMIC_SERVER_USAGE log lines are pre-existing runtime warnings from cookie-based routes, unrelated to these changes

## Files Modified
1. `src/lib/marketplace/adapters/shopify.adapter.ts` - Removed duplicate token fetcher, replaced all 5 call sites with cached `getAccessToken`
2. `src/lib/marketplace/adapters/tsoft.adapter.ts` - Added module-level 30-min token cache
3. `src/lib/sync-engine.ts` - Fixed `totalTenants` to exclude admin tenants
